GET /api/admin/settings.description: Existing settings endpoint — now includes branding fields in response

PATCH /api/admin/settings/branding.description: Update site name and/or logo URL. Both fields are optional — omitting one leaves it unchanged.

siteName.description: New display name for the site. Reflected in browser titles, headers, and HTML metadata.

siteLogoUrl.description: Cloudinary URL of the uploaded logo image. Empty string resets to default placeholder.

examples: siteLogoUrl is not a valid URL

propagationContract.description: After a successful PATCH /api/admin/settings/branding, all server-rendered pages reflect the new branding on the next page load. No client cache invalidation step is required beyond a single page reload.

logoUploadFlow.description: Logo file is NOT sent directly to /api/admin/settings/branding. The admin UI first uploads the image via the existing Cloudinary sign endpoint, receives a Cloudinary URL, then sends that URL to PATCH /api/admin/settings/branding.
steps: 1. Client calls POST /api/cloudinary/sign to get an upload signature
2. Client uploads image directly to Cloudinary
4. Client calls PATCH /api/admin/settings/branding with { siteLogoUrl: secure_url }
5. Server validates URL and persists to SettingsConfiguration.branding.siteLogoUrl
